results.notes: docx-create lost 10 points on 'content' criterion (body paragraph text partially mismatched). Skill was the full verbose version with redlining, image conversion, and other irrelevant workflows.

results.description: Rewrote SKILL.md for SLM: inlined docx-js patterns, removed editing/redlining/image workflows, added explicit extraction examples with JSON parsing guidance
results.notes: Perfect scores on both runs. Confirmed with a second run. Key changes: (1) Removed all editing/redlining/image conversion content not tested by tasks, (2) Inlined critical docx-js code patterns directly in SKILL.md instead of referencing external file, (3) Added explicit table creation pattern, (4) Added structured data extraction workflow with python-docx example including numeric conversion guidance, (5) Added CRITICAL RULES section for common docx-js pitfalls.

changes_made: Removed docx-js.md reference file (inlined key patterns into SKILL.md)
Removed ooxml.md reference file (editing workflows not needed)
Removed ooxml/ directory (schemas and scripts for editing)
Removed scripts/ directory (document.py, utilities.py for editing)
Rewrote SKILL.md from 197 lines to ~140 lines focused on creation and extraction
Inlined docx-js minimal working example with headings, paragraphs, bullets, tables
Added explicit text extraction workflow after document creation
Added structured data extraction workflow with python-docx and JSON output
Added CRITICAL RULES section for common SLM pitfalls (no \n, no unicode bullets, ShadingType.CLEAR)
